plugins.name: reachdesk
plugins.description: Send gifts, track deliveries, and manage gifting campaigns through Reachdesk. Browse contacts, trigger sends, and monitor spend across your team.

plugins.name: linkedin-ads-manager
plugins.description: Programmatic LinkedIn ABM campaign management — clone campaigns, analyze targeting, update budgets, batch pause/resume, audit spend, and search URNs via a Python CLI.

plugins.name: aeo-content-optimizer
plugins.description: Write blog posts and articles optimized for AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Google AI Overviews). Structures content for maximum citation likelihood, share of voice, and visibility in LLM responses.
